Retractor Lite 36 Hardware for Professional Trade Show Displays

Professional-grade retractable banner hardware designed for trade shows, presentations, and business displays. This lightweight aluminum system provides reliable performance for your custom banner presentations.

Key Features for Professional Display Use

  • Lightweight aluminum construction for easy transport
  • Available in black or silver hardware finishes
  • Dual swivel feet provide superior stability
  • Shock cord pole system enables quick setup and breakdown
  • Snap rail attachment system for secure banner mounting
  • Banner tape bottom attachment for professional display

Display Specifications

  • Display Size: 36.5" W x 83.5" H x 15" D
  • Hardware Weight: 7.5 lbs
  • Portable design ideal for trade shows and events
  • Compatible with custom printed banners (sold separately)

Perfect for trade show booths, retail displays, presentations, and promotional events where professional appearance and easy setup are essential.

Banner Design Requirements for Retractor Lite 36 Hardware

Banner Specifications

  • Banner Width: 36" maximum width
  • Banner Height: Up to 83" display height
  • Print Area: Allow for top and bottom attachment areas
  • Recommended Size: 36" x 80" finished banner

Design Guidelines

  • Maintain 0.5" margin from all edges for attachment hardware
  • Design resolution: 150 DPI minimum at full size
  • Use high-contrast colors for maximum visibility
  • Keep important text at least 2" from top and bottom edges
  • Consider viewing distance when selecting text sizes

File Format Requirements

  • Accepted formats: PDF, AI, EPS, PSD, JPG, PNG
  • Include bleed area for full-coverage designs
  • Convert all text to outlines or include font files
  • CMYK color mode preferred for accurate printing
  • High-resolution images ensure crisp display quality

Banner Material Options

This hardware system works with various banner materials:

  • Vinyl banners for outdoor durability
  • Fabric banners for premium indoor displays
  • Mesh banners for windy conditions
  • Canvas banners for elegant presentations

Note: Banner sold separately. Upload your design or work with our design team to create the perfect banner for your Retractor Lite 36 hardware.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Retractor Lite 36 Hardware

What banner materials work with this hardware?

The Retractor Lite 36 hardware is compatible with vinyl banners, fabric banners, mesh banners, and canvas banners. The snap rail system accommodates most standard banner materials up to 36" wide.

Is the banner included with the hardware?

No, the banner is sold separately. This allows you to order multiple banners for the same hardware unit or replace banners as needed for different events and presentations.

How difficult is the setup process?

Setup is very simple and requires no tools. The shock cord pole system snaps together quickly, and the banner attaches via the snap rail system on top and banner tape on bottom. Most users can set up in under 5 minutes.

What's the difference between black and silver hardware?

Both options offer identical functionality and durability. Choose black for a sleek, professional look that blends with dark banner designs, or silver for a classic aluminum finish that complements any color scheme.

Can I use this hardware outdoors?

The Retractor Lite 36 is designed primarily for indoor use at trade shows, conferences, and business presentations. For outdoor applications, consider our heavier-duty banner stands designed for wind resistance.

What if my banner gets damaged?

The quick-change banner system allows you to easily replace damaged banners without replacing the entire hardware unit. Simply order a new banner and swap it out using the snap rail attachment system.

Do you offer quantity discounts for multiple units?

Yes, volume pricing is available for orders of multiple hardware units. Contact our customer service team for a custom quote on large quantity orders for trade shows or corporate events.

How long will the hardware last with regular use?

With proper care and storage, the aluminum construction is designed to withstand hundreds of setup and breakdown cycles. The hardware comes with a manufacturer's warranty against defects.
